potential_missing.source_sentence: From there, they may either go into a discussion or continue to view videos.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: A user can either create an account or continue to the video section directly.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow a user to continue to the video section directly without creating an account.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: From there, they may either go into a discussion or continue to view videos.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow a user to choose between going into a discussion or continuing to view videos after watching videos.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: While viewing videos, the user may either finish there or save videos in their likes list.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow a user to save videos in their likes list while viewing videos.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall enable a user to view their saved videos from the likes list.
hallucinations.reason: The source text does not explicitly state that users can view their saved videos from the likes list. It only mentions saving videos in the likes list.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow a user to enter the discussion option.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is not clearly defined in the source text. It does not specify what happens after entering the discussion option.

final_assessment_policy: moderate: needs_review if extraction/rewriting failed, no rewritten requirements were produced, exact duplicate rewritten requirements were detected, or the LLM validator reports 6 or more total issues across missing requirements, hallucinations, duplicates, and ambiguities
